FCT_Game.notes: Sample game always present; exclude by GameName != 'Sample' when resolving active campaign.

FCT_Race.notes: NPR=0 is the player race. Confirm MIN vs MAX RaceID for player on first boot.

FCT_System.notes: FCT_System has no coordinate columns. Inter-system distances are derived from FCT_JumpPoint.Distance (system center to jump point) with Xcor/Ycor fallback.

FCT_Population.notes: Confirm population unit (thousands vs raw count).

FCT_Ship.notes: Confirm join column to FCT_ShipDesign: ShipDesignID or ClassID.

FCT_MineralDeposit.notes: Confirm mineral name lookup table name.

FCT_JumpPoint.notes: Check for self-referencing FK to destination SystemID.

get_session_context.description: Returns the GameID, GameName, RaceID, and RaceName the server has resolved for this session. Call this first to confirm the correct campaign is loaded before querying game state.
get_session_context.sql: SELECT g.GameID, g.GameName, r.RaceID, r.RaceName FROM FCT_Game g JOIN FCT_Race r ON r.GameID = g.GameID WHERE g.GameID = :game_id AND r.RaceID = :race_id
get_session_context.notes: Column names need verification on first boot.

game_log.description: Fetches game log entries for the player race, looking back a specified number of in-game days or hours. Pass either days or hours (not both); the other should be 0.
game_log.sql: SELECT EventType, MessageText, Time, DATE((SELECT StartYear || '-01-01' FROM FCT_Game WHERE GameID = :game_id), '+' || CAST(CAST(Time AS INTEGER) AS TEXT) || ' seconds') AS GameDate FROM FCT_GameLog WHERE RaceID = :race_id AND GameID = :game_id AND Time >= (SELECT MAX(Time) - (:days * 86400 + :hours * 3600) FROM FCT_GameLog WHERE RaceID = :race_id AND GameID = :game_id) ORDER BY Time DESC
game_log.notes: Time is in seconds since game start. 1 day = 86400 seconds, 1 hour = 3600 seconds. StartYear pulled dynamically from FCT_Game.

mineral_survey.description: Detailed mineral survey results for all surveyed bodies, showing mineral name, amount, accessibility, and accessible amount for the player race. Returns body-level granularity (e.g. 'Sol-A II', 'Sol-A V Moon 1') — use this when you need to identify the specific planet, moon, or asteroid holding a deposit for colony site selection or mining outpost placement. For system-level strategic overviews use mineral_survey_by_system; for proximity-based expansion planning use minerals_near_system.
mineral_survey.sql:
SELECT
  rss.Name AS SystemName,
  COALESCE(sbn.Name, sb.Name) AS BodyName,
  CASE md.MaterialID
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Duranium'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Neutronium'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Corbomite'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'Tritanium'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Boronide'
    WHEN 6 THEN 'Mercassium'
    WHEN 7 THEN 'Vendarite'
    WHEN 8 THEN 'Sorium'
    WHEN 9 THEN 'Uridium'
    WHEN 10 THEN 'Corundium'
    WHEN 11 THEN 'Gallicite'
    ELSE 'Unknown(' || md.MaterialID || ')'
  END AS MineralName,
  ROUND(md.Amount, 0) AS Amount,
  md.Accessibility,
  ROUND(md.Amount * md.Accessibility, 0) AS AccessibleAmount
FROM FCT_MineralDeposit md
JOIN FCT_SystemBody sb ON md.SystemBodyID = sb.SystemBodyID AND md.GameID = sb.GameID
JOIN FCT_RaceSysSurvey rss ON sb.SystemID = rss.SystemID AND sb.GameID = rss.GameID AND rss.RaceID = :race_id
LEFT JOIN FCT_SystemBodyName sbn ON md.SystemBodyID = sbn.SystemBodyID AND md.GameID = sbn.GameID AND sbn.RaceID = :race_id
WHERE md.GameID = :game_id
  AND md.Amount > 0
ORDER BY rss.Name, COALESCE(sbn.Name, sb.Name), md.MaterialID
mineral_survey.notes: Body-level granularity is the key differentiator from the other mineral tools. mineral_survey_by_system aggregates this data per system (losing body identity), and minerals_near_system filters by jump distance but also aggregates. Use this tool when the specific body matters — confirming which moon or planet holds a deposit, comparing two candidate colony bodies, or planning where to place automated mines.

mineral_survey_by_system.description: Summarizes minerals by system and mineral type, showing total amount, average accessibility, and total accessible amount across all surveyed bodies. Optionally filter by mineral name (e.g. 'Gallicite'). Leave mineral_name empty to get all minerals.
mineral_survey_by_system.sql: SELECT sys.Name AS SystemName, COUNT(DISTINCT dep.SystemBodyID) AS NumBodies, CASE dep.MaterialID WHEN 1 THEN 'Duranium' WHEN 2 THEN 'Neutronium' WHEN 3 THEN 'Corbomite' WHEN 4 THEN 'Tritanium' WHEN 5 THEN 'Boronide' WHEN 6 THEN 'Mercassium' WHEN 7 THEN 'Vendarite' WHEN 8 THEN 'Sorium' WHEN 9 THEN 'Uridium' WHEN 10 THEN 'Corundium' WHEN 11 THEN 'Gallicite' END AS MineralName, ROUND(SUM(dep.Amount), 0) AS TotalAmount, ROUND(AVG(dep.Amount), 0) AS AvgAmountPerBody, ROUND(AVG(dep.Accessibility), 2) AS AvgAccessibility, ROUND(SUM(dep.Amount * dep.Accessibility), 0) AS TotalAccessibleAmount FROM FCT_SystemBodySurveys surv INNER JOIN FCT_MineralDeposit dep ON surv.SystemBodyID = dep.SystemBodyID AND surv.GameID = dep.GameID INNER JOIN FCT_RaceSysSurvey sys ON dep.SystemID = sys.SystemID AND surv.GameID = dep.GameID AND surv.RaceID = sys.RaceID LEFT OUTER JOIN FCT_SystemBodyName sysbodyname ON dep.SystemBodyID = sysbodyname.SystemBodyID AND surv.GameID = dep.GameID LEFT OUTER JOIN FCT_SystemBody sysbody ON dep.SystemBodyID = sysbody.SystemBodyID AND surv.GameID = dep.GameID WHERE surv.RaceID = :race_id AND surv.GameID = :game_id AND dep.Amount > 0 AND (:mineral_name = '' OR CASE dep.MaterialID WHEN 1 THEN 'Duranium' WHEN 2 THEN 'Neutronium' WHEN 3 THEN 'Corbomite' WHEN 4 THEN 'Tritanium' WHEN 5 THEN 'Boronide' WHEN 6 THEN 'Mercassium' WHEN 7 THEN 'Vendarite' WHEN 8 THEN 'Sorium' WHEN 9 THEN 'Uridium' WHEN 10 THEN 'Corundium' WHEN 11 THEN 'Gallicite' END = :mineral_name) GROUP BY sys.Name, dep.MaterialID ORDER BY TotalAccessibleAmount DESC
mineral_survey_by_system.notes: Groups by system and mineral. TotalAccessibleAmount = SUM(Amount * Accessibility). Pass mineral_name as exact name (e.g. 'Duranium') or empty string for all. Use alongside mineral_survey for body-level drill-down.

colony_report.description: Full colony report for the player race, showing population, species, capital status, unrest, fuel and MSP stockpiles, mineral stockpiles on the ground, and all planetary installations with their production queues. Ordered by population descending.
colony_report.sql:
SELECT
    DATE((SELECT StartYear || '-01-01' FROM FCT_Game WHERE GameID = :game_id), '+' || CAST(CAST((SELECT MAX(Time) FROM FCT_GameLog WHERE GameID = :game_id AND RaceID = :race_id) AS INTEGER) AS TEXT) || ' seconds') AS "Game Date",
    sys.Name AS "System Name",
    p.PopName AS "Colony Name",
    s.SpeciesName AS "Species",
    ROUND(p.Population, 2) AS "Population (millions)",
    CASE CAST(p.Capital AS INTEGER) WHEN 1 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS "Capital",
    ROUND(p.UnrestPoints, 2) AS "Unrest Points",
    ROUND(p.FuelStockpile, 0) AS "Fuel Stockpile",
    ROUND(p.MaintenanceStockpile, 0) AS "MSP Stockpile",
    p.SystemID AS "System ID",
    p.SystemBodyID AS "Body ID",
    ROUND(p.Duranium, 0) AS "Duranium",
    ROUND(p.Neutronium, 0) AS "Neutronium",
    ROUND(p.Corbomite, 0) AS "Corbomite",
    ROUND(p.Tritanium, 0) AS "Tritanium",
    ROUND(p.Boronide, 0) AS "Boronide",
    ROUND(p.Mercassium, 0) AS "Mercassium",
    ROUND(p.Vendarite, 0) AS "Vendarite",
    ROUND(p.Sorium, 0) AS "Sorium",
    ROUND(p.Uridium, 0) AS "Uridium",
    ROUND(p.Corundium, 0) AS "Corundium",
    ROUND(p.Gallicite, 0) AS "Gallicite",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 38 THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Conventional Industry",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 38 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Conventional Industry (Queue)",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 5  THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Construction Factory",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 5  THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Construction Factory (Queue)",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 7  THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Mine",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 7  THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Mine (Queue)",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 12 THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Automated Mine",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 12 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Automated Mine (Queue)",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 3  THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Fuel Refinery",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 3  THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Fuel Refinery (Queue)",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 34 THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Ordnance Factory",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 34 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Ordnance Factory (Queue)",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 35 THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Fighter Factory",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 35 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Fighter Factory (Queue)",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 8  THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Research Facility",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 8  THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Research Facility (Queue)",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 21 THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Maintenance Facility",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 21 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Maintenance Facility (Queue)",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 9  THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Infrastructure",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 9  THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Infrastructure (Queue)",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 6  THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Terraforming Installation",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 6  THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Terraforming Installation (Queue)",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 11 THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Deep Space Tracking Station",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 11 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Deep Space Tracking Station (Queue)",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 14 THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Military Academy",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 14 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Military Academy (Queue)",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 17 THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Ground Force Construction Complex",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 17 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Ground Force Construction Complex (Queue)",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 20 THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Sector Command",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 20 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Sector Command (Queue)",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 24 THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Mass Driver",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 24 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Mass Driver (Queue)",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 25 THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Financial Centre",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 25 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Financial Centre (Queue)",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 33 THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Spaceport",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 33 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Spaceport (Queue)",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 40 THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Genetic Modification Centre",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 40 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Genetic Modification Centre (Queue)",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 43 THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Refuelling Station",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 43 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Refuelling Station (Queue)",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 44 THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Naval Headquarters",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 44 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Naval Headquarters (Queue)",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 45 THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Ordnance Transfer Station",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 45 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Ordnance Transfer Station (Queue)",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 46 THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Cargo Shuttle Station",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 46 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Cargo Shuttle Station (Queue)",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 4  THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Naval Shipyard Complex",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 4  THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Naval Shipyard Complex (Queue)",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 32 THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Commercial Shipyard Complex",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 32 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Commercial Shipyard Complex (Queue)",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 51 THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Repair Yard",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 51 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Repair Yard (Queue)",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 39 THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Civilian Mining Complex",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 39 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Civilian Mining Complex (Queue)",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 52 THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Ex-Civilian Mining Complex",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 52 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Ex-Civilian Mining Complex (Queue)",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 47 THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Forced Labour Construction Camp",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 47 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Forced Labour Construction Camp (Queue)",
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN pi.PlanetaryInstallationID = 48 THEN pi.Amount END), 0) AS "Forced Labour Mining Camp",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 48 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Forced Labour Mining Camp (Queue)",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 18 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Convert Mine to Automated (Queue)",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 27 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Convert CI to Construction Factory (Queue)",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 28 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Convert CI to Mine (Queue)",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 30 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Convert CI to Fuel Refinery (Queue)",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 36 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Convert CI to Ordnance Factory (Queue)",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 37 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Convert CI to Fighter Factory (Queue)",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ip.ProductionID = 50 THEN ip.Amount END), 0) AS "Convert CI to Financial Centre (Queue)"
FROM FCT_Population p
    INNER JOIN FCT_Species s ON p.SpeciesID = s.SpeciesID
    LEFT JOIN FCT_RaceSysSurvey sys ON p.SystemID = sys.SystemID AND p.GameID = sys.GameID AND sys.RaceID = p.RaceID
    LEFT JOIN FCT_PopulationInstallations pi ON p.PopulationID = pi.PopID AND p.GameID = pi.GameID
    LEFT JOIN FCT_IndustrialProjects ip ON p.PopulationID = ip.PopulationID AND p.GameID = ip.GameID AND p.RaceID = ip.RaceID AND ip.ProductionType = 0
WHERE p.RaceID = :race_id AND p.GameID = :game_id
    AND (s.SpeciesID = (SELECT DefaultRaceID FROM FCT_Game WHERE GameID = :game_id) OR s.DerivedSpeciesID = (SELECT DefaultRaceID FROM FCT_Game WHERE GameID = :game_id))
GROUP BY p.PopulationID, sys.Name, p.PopName, s.SpeciesName, p.Population, p.Capital, p.UnrestPoints, p.FuelStockpile, p.MaintenanceStockpile, p.SystemID, p.SystemBodyID, p.Duranium, p.Neutronium, p.Corbomite, p.Tritanium, p.Boronide, p.Mercassium, p.Vendarite, p.Sorium, p.Uridium, p.Corundium, p.Gallicite
ORDER BY p.Population DESC
colony_report.notes: Filters to the player's primary species and derived species (SpeciesID 753 hardcoded — needs to be made dynamic). Uses pivoted CASE/MAX for installations and SUM for queue amounts. ProductionType = 0 filters to installation projects only.

commander_assignment.description: Look up commander details by name fragment — returns officer type, rank (Naval/Ground only), current assignment, homeworld, and full career history ordered by game time.
commander_assignment.sql:
SELECT
  c.CommanderID,
  c.Name,
  CASE c.CommanderType
    WHEN 0 THEN 'Naval'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Ground Forces'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Scientist'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Administrator'
    ELSE 'Unknown (' || c.CommanderType || ')'
  END AS OfficerType,
  CASE WHEN c.CommanderType IN (0, 1) THEN r.RankName ELSE NULL END AS RankName,
  CASE WHEN c.CommanderType IN (0, 1) THEN r.RankAbbrev ELSE NULL END AS RankAbbrev,
  c.CommandType,
  c.CommandID,
  COALESCE(p.PopName, 'Unknown') AS Homeworld,
  h.HistoryText,
  h.GameTime AS HistoryGameTime
FROM FCT_Commander c
LEFT JOIN FCT_Ranks r
  ON r.RankID = c.RankID
  AND r.GameID = c.GameID
LEFT JOIN FCT_Population p
  ON p.SystemBodyID = c.HomeworldID
  AND p.GameID = c.GameID
LEFT JOIN FCT_CommanderHistory h
  ON h.CommanderID = c.CommanderID
  AND h.GameID = c.GameID
WHERE c.GameID = :game_id
  AND c.RaceID = :race_id
  AND c.Name LIKE '%' || :name_fragment || '%'
ORDER BY c.Name, h.GameTime ASC
commander_assignment.notes: CommanderType: 0=Naval, 1=Ground Forces, 2=Scientist, 3=Administrator. Rank only applies to Naval and Ground officers. History is aggregated from FCT_CommanderHistory ordered chronologically.

ship_design_report.description: Full ship design report for all Court vessel classes — identity, propulsion, armour, sensors, maintenance, cargo, special roles, EW, and full component manifest. Includes capture provenance: IsCaptured flag, Source Class, and Source Race for reverse-engineered or captured designs. Excludes shipping line vessels. Returns one row per class ordered by type (military first), obsolescence, size descending, then name.
ship_design_report.sql:
SELECT
    sc.ShipClassID AS "Class ID",
    sc.ClassName AS "Class Name",
    CASE WHEN sc.Commercial = 0 THEN 'Military' ELSE 'Commercial' END AS "Type",
    CASE WHEN sc.FighterClass = 1 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS "Fighter",
    CASE WHEN sc.Obsolete = 1 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS "Obsolete",
    CASE WHEN sc.OtherRaceClassID != 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "IsCaptured",
    sc2.ClassName AS "Source Class",
    r2.RaceName AS "Source Race",
    ROUND(sc.Size, 2) AS "Tonnage (HS)",
    sc.Cost AS "Cost",
    sc.TotalNumber AS "Total Built",
    sc.MaxSpeed AS "Max Speed",
    sc.EnginePower AS "Engine Power",
    sc.FuelEfficiency AS "Fuel Efficiency",
    sc.FuelCapacity AS "Fuel Capacity",
    sc.MinimumFuel AS "Minimum Fuel",
    sc.JumpRating AS "Jump Rating",
    sc.JumpDistance AS "Jump Distance",
    sc.Crew AS "Crew",
    sc.PlannedDeployment AS "Planned Deployment (yrs)",
    sc.ControlRating AS "Control Rating",
    sc.ArmourThickness AS "Armour Thickness",
    sc.ArmourWidth AS "Armour Width",
    sc.ProtectionValue AS "Protection Value",
    sc.ShieldStrength AS "Shield Strength",
    sc.DCRating AS "DC Rating",
    sc.ActiveSensorStrength AS "Active Sensor Strength",
    sc.PassiveSensorStrength AS "Passive Sensor Strength",
    sc.EMSensorStrength AS "EM Sensor Strength",
    sc.ClassThermal AS "Thermal Signature",
    sc.ClassCrossSection AS "Cross Section (EM)",
    sc.SensorReduction AS "Sensor Reduction",
    sc.MaintSupplies AS "Maint Supplies Capacity",
    sc.MinimumSupplies AS "Minimum Supplies",
    sc.BaseFailureChance AS "Base Failure Chance",
    sc.CargoCapacity AS "Cargo Capacity",
    sc.ColonistCapacity AS "Colonist Capacity",
    sc.TroopCapacity AS "Troop Capacity",
    sc.WorkerCapacity AS "Worker Capacity",
    sc.MagazineCapacity AS "Magazine Capacity",
    sc.ParasiteCapacity AS "Parasite Capacity",
    sc.GeoSurvey AS "Geo Survey",
    sc.GravSurvey AS "Grav Survey",
    sc.MiningModules AS "Mining Modules",
    sc.Harvesters AS "Harvesters",
    sc.Terraformers AS "Terraformers",
    sc.Collier AS "Collier",
    sc.FuelTanker AS "Fuel Tanker",
    sc.SupplyShip AS "Supply Ship",
    sc.RepairYardCapacity AS "Repair Yard Capacity",
    sc.CargoShuttleStrength AS "Cargo Shuttle Strength",
    sc.ActiveJammerStrength AS "Active Jammer",
    sc.FireControlJammerStrength AS "FC Jammer",
    sc.MissileJammerStrength AS "Missile Jammer",
    sc.ELINTRating AS "ELINT Rating",
    sc.DiplomacyRating AS "Diplomacy Rating",
    COUNT(DISTINCT cc.ComponentID) AS "Distinct Components",
    ROUND(SUM(cc.NumComponent * comp.Size), 2) AS "Component HS Total",
    MAX(CASE WHEN comp.BeamWeapon = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Has Beam Weapons",
    MAX(CASE WHEN comp.Weapon = 1 AND comp.BeamWeapon = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Has Other Weapons",
    MAX(CASE WHEN comp.JumpRating > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Has Jump Drive",
    MAX(CASE WHEN comp.StealthRating > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Has Stealth",
    MAX(CASE WHEN comp.CloakRating > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Has Cloak",
    MAX(CASE WHEN comp.ECCM > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Has ECCM",
    GROUP_CONCAT(CAST(CAST(cc.NumComponent AS INTEGER) AS TEXT) || 'x ' || comp.Name, ' | ') AS "Components"
FROM FCT_ShipClass sc
LEFT JOIN FCT_ClassComponent cc ON sc.ShipClassID = cc.ClassID
    AND cc.GameID = :game_id
    AND cc.NumComponent > 0
LEFT JOIN FCT_ShipDesignComponents comp ON cc.ComponentID = comp.SDComponentID
LEFT JOIN FCT_ShipClass sc2 ON sc.OtherRaceClassID = sc2.ShipClassID
LEFT JOIN FCT_Race r2 ON sc2.RaceID = r2.RaceID
WHERE sc.GameID = :game_id
  AND sc.RaceID = :race_id
  AND sc.ClassShippingLineID = 0
GROUP BY sc.ShipClassID
ORDER BY sc.Commercial ASC, sc.Obsolete ASC, sc.Size DESC, sc.ClassName ASC
ship_design_report.notes: OtherRaceClassID != 0 indicates a captured/reverse-engineered design. Join resolves Source Class and Source Race via self-join on FCT_ShipClass then FCT_Race. No spoiler risk: query is filtered to RaceID = :race_id; FCT_ShipClass only contains foreign designs the player has already reverse-engineered. FCT_ClassComponent joins to FCT_ShipDesignComponents via ComponentID = SDComponentID; count column is NumComponent. Zero-count component rows filtered out to avoid '0x Armour' artefacts. Tonnage rounded to 2dp to suppress Aurora float noise.

colony_ordnance_stockpiles.description: Shows all missile/ordnance stockpiles held at Court colonies, grouped by colony and missile type. Returns colony name, body name, system name, missile name, stock count, size in MSP, total MSP held, and key combat stats. Optional filter by missile name (partial match). Only shows colonies with stock > 0.
colony_ordnance_stockpiles.sql:
SELECT
    pop.PopName AS Colony,
    sbn.Name AS Body,
    rss.Name AS System,
    mt.Name AS MissileName,
    CAST(pw.Amount AS INTEGER) AS Stock,
    mt.Size AS "Size (MSP)",
    ROUND(pw.Amount * mt.Size, 0) AS "Total MSP",
    mt.Speed AS "Speed (km/s)",
    ROUND(mt.MaxRange / 1000000.0, 2) AS "Max Range (Mkm)",
    mt.WarheadStrength AS Warhead,
    mt.ECM,
    mt.ECCM,
    mt.ShipDecoy AS "Ship Decoy",
    mt.MissileID
FROM FCT_PopulationWeapon pw
JOIN FCT_Population pop ON pw.PopulationID = pop.PopulationID
JOIN FCT_SystemBodyName sbn ON pop.SystemBodyID = sbn.SystemBodyID AND sbn.RaceID = :race_id
JOIN FCT_RaceSysSurvey rss ON pop.SystemID = rss.SystemID AND rss.RaceID = :race_id AND rss.GameID = :game_id
JOIN FCT_MissileType mt ON pw.MissileID = mt.MissileID
WHERE pw.GameID = :game_id
  AND pop.RaceID = :race_id
  AND pw.Amount > 0
  AND (:missile_name = '' OR mt.Name LIKE '%' || :missile_name || '%')
ORDER BY pop.PopName, pw.Amount DESC
colony_ordnance_stockpiles.notes: Stockpiles live in FCT_PopulationWeapon. Body name from FCT_SystemBodyName (RaceID-keyed). System name from FCT_RaceSysSurvey (RaceID+GameID-keyed). Speed stored as km/s. MaxRange stored as km — divide by 1,000,000 for Mkm. missile_name is optional — pass empty string to get all.

missile_catalogue.description: Full missile/ordnance catalogue for the Court race — all missile types with complete stats: speed, range, warhead, endurance, ECM/ECCM, sensors, decoys, staging, ground attack, cost, and total stock held across all colonies. Optional filter by missile name (partial match). Covers ASMs, AMMs, torpedoes, ship decoys, and sensor buoys.
missile_catalogue.sql:
SELECT
    mt.MissileID,
    mt.Name AS "Missile Name",
    mt.Size AS "Size (MSP)",
    ROUND(mt.Cost, 2) AS Cost,
    COALESCE(SUM(pw.Amount), 0) AS "Total Stock",
    mt.Speed AS "Speed (km/s)",
    ROUND(mt.MaxRange / 1000000.0, 2) AS "Max Range (Mkm)",
    ROUND(mt.Endurance, 1) AS "Endurance (hrs)",
    mt.WarheadStrength AS Warhead,
    mt.LaserWarhead AS "Laser WH",
    mt.MR,
    mt.ECM,
    mt.ECCM,
    mt.Retargeting,
    mt.SensorStrength AS "Sensor Str",
    mt.SensorResolution AS "Sensor Res",
    mt.ThermalStrength AS "Thermal Str",
    mt.EMStrength AS "EM Str",
    mt.NumEngines AS Engines,
    mt.NumSS AS Stages,
    mt.SecondStageID AS "2nd Stage ID",
    mt.NumDecoys AS Decoys,
    mt.ShipDecoy AS "Ship Decoy",
    mt.MultipleWarheads AS "Multi-WH",
    mt.RadDamage AS "Rad Damage",
    mt.GroundDamage AS "Ground Dmg",
    mt.GroundAP AS "Ground AP"
FROM FCT_MissileType mt
LEFT JOIN FCT_PopulationWeapon pw ON mt.MissileID = pw.MissileID
    AND pw.GameID = :game_id
LEFT JOIN FCT_Population pop ON pw.PopulationID = pop.PopulationID
    AND pop.RaceID = :race_id
WHERE mt.GameID = :game_id
  AND mt.Name NOT LIKE '%DEFECT%'
  AND (:missile_name = '' OR mt.Name LIKE '%' || :missile_name || '%')
  AND mt.MissileID IN (
      SELECT DISTINCT cot.MissileID
      FROM FCT_ClassOrdnanceTemplate cot
      JOIN FCT_ShipClass sc ON cot.ShipClassID = sc.ShipClassID
      WHERE sc.RaceID = :race_id AND sc.GameID = :game_id
      UNION
      SELECT DISTINCT pw2.MissileID
      FROM FCT_PopulationWeapon pw2
      JOIN FCT_Population pop2 ON pw2.PopulationID = pop2.PopulationID
      WHERE pop2.RaceID = :race_id AND pop2.GameID = :game_id
  )
GROUP BY mt.MissileID
ORDER BY mt.Size DESC, mt.Name ASC
missile_catalogue.notes: Total stock summed from FCT_PopulationWeapon across all Court colonies — MissilesAvailable on FCT_MissileType is always 0 and unused. Speed stored as km/s. MaxRange stored as km — divide by 1,000,000 for Mkm. Only includes missiles assigned to a Court class OR held in a Court stockpile. Filters out DEFECT designs. missile_name is optional — pass empty string to get all.

class_ordnance_templates.description: Returns the ordnance load-out template for all Court ship classes — which missiles are assigned to each class and in what quantity, joined with full missile stats and total colony stock. Filter by class name using the optional class_name param (supports partial match). Pass empty string to get all classes.
class_ordnance_templates.sql:
SELECT
    sc.ClassName AS "Class Name",
    mt.Name AS "Missile Name",
    cot.Amount AS Amount,
    mt.Size AS "Size (MSP)",
    ROUND(mt.Cost, 2) AS Cost,
    COALESCE(stock.TotalStock, 0) AS "Total Stock",
    mt.Speed AS "Speed (km/s)",
    ROUND(mt.MaxRange / 1000000.0, 2) AS "Max Range (Mkm)",
    ROUND(mt.Endurance, 1) AS "Endurance (hrs)",
    mt.WarheadStrength AS Warhead,
    mt.LaserWarhead AS "Laser WH",
    mt.MR,
    mt.ECM,
    mt.ECCM,
    mt.Retargeting,
    mt.SensorStrength AS "Sensor Str",
    mt.SensorResolution AS "Sensor Res",
    mt.NumSS AS Stages,
    mt.SecondStageID AS "2nd Stage ID",
    mt.NumDecoys AS Decoys,
    mt.ShipDecoy AS "Ship Decoy",
    mt.MultipleWarheads AS "Multi-WH",
    mt.GroundDamage AS "Ground Dmg",
    mt.GroundAP AS "Ground AP",
    mt.MissileID
FROM FCT_ClassOrdnanceTemplate cot
JOIN FCT_ShipClass sc ON cot.ShipClassID = sc.ShipClassID
JOIN FCT_MissileType mt ON cot.MissileID = mt.MissileID
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT pw.MissileID, SUM(pw.Amount) AS TotalStock
    FROM FCT_PopulationWeapon pw
    JOIN FCT_Population pop ON pw.PopulationID = pop.PopulationID
    WHERE pop.RaceID = :race_id AND pop.GameID = :game_id
    GROUP BY pw.MissileID
) stock ON mt.MissileID = stock.MissileID
WHERE sc.GameID = :game_id
  AND sc.RaceID = :race_id
  AND (:class_name = '' OR sc.ClassName LIKE '%' || :class_name || '%')
ORDER BY sc.ClassName, cot.Amount DESC
class_ordnance_templates.notes: FCT_ClassOrdnanceTemplate joins to FCT_MissileType for stats. Speed is stored as km/s. MaxRange is stored in km — divided by 1,000,000 for Mkm. Total stock summed from FCT_PopulationWeapon across Court colonies (same source as colony_ordnance_stockpiles). class_name is optional — pass empty string to get all.

minerals_near_system.description: Returns mineral survey data for all systems within N hops of a given source system. Useful for finding nearby resource deposits when planning mining operations or colony support. Params: source_system_id, max_hops (default 8), mineral_name (optional partial match filter).
minerals_near_system.sql:
WITH RECURSIVE jump_chain AS (
  SELECT
    jp.SystemID,
    0 AS hops,
    '|' || CAST(jp.SystemID AS TEXT) || '|' AS path
  FROM FCT_JumpPoint jp
  WHERE jp.GameID = :game_id AND jp.SystemID = :source_system_id
  GROUP BY jp.SystemID

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    jp_dest.SystemID,
    jc.hops + 1,
    jc.path || CAST(jp_dest.SystemID AS TEXT) || '|'
  FROM jump_chain jc
  INNER JOIN FCT_JumpPoint jp_source
    ON jc.SystemID = jp_source.SystemID
    AND jp_source.GameID = :game_id
    AND jp_source.WPLink > 0
  INNER JOIN FCT_JumpPoint jp_dest
    ON jp_source.WPLink = jp_dest.WarpPointID
    AND jp_dest.GameID = :game_id
  WHERE jc.hops < COALESCE(:max_hops, 8)
    AND jc.path NOT LIKE '%|' || CAST(jp_dest.SystemID AS TEXT) || '|%'
),
nearest AS (
  SELECT SystemID, MIN(hops) AS hops
  FROM jump_chain
  GROUP BY SystemID
)
SELECT
  n.hops AS "Hops",
  COALESCE(rss.Name, 'Unsurveyed System ' || n.SystemID) AS "SystemName",
  n.SystemID AS "SystemID",
  m.MineralName AS "Mineral",
  ROUND(m.TotalAmount, 0) AS "TotalAmount",
  ROUND(m.AvgAccessibility, 2) AS "AvgAccessibility",
  ROUND(m.TotalAccessible, 0) AS "TotalAccessible"
FROM nearest n
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT
    sb.SystemID,
    min.MineralName,
    SUM(sbs.MineralAmount) AS TotalAmount,
    AVG(sbs.Accessibility) AS AvgAccessibility,
    SUM(sbs.MineralAmount * sbs.Accessibility) AS TotalAccessible
  FROM FCT_SystemBodySurveys sbs
  INNER JOIN FCT_SystemBody sb ON sbs.BodyID = sb.BodyID AND sb.GameID = :game_id
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT 1 AS MineralID, 'Duranium' AS MineralName UNION ALL
    SELECT 2, 'Neutronium' UNION ALL
    SELECT 3, 'Corbomite' UNION ALL
    SELECT 4, 'Tritanium' UNION ALL
    SELECT 5, 'Boronide' UNION ALL
    SELECT 6, 'Mercassium' UNION ALL
    SELECT 7, 'Vendarite' UNION ALL
    SELECT 8, 'Sorium' UNION ALL
    SELECT 9, 'Uridium' UNION ALL
    SELECT 10, 'Corundium' UNION ALL
    SELECT 11, 'Gallicite'
  ) min ON sbs.MineralID = min.MineralID
  WHERE sbs.MineralAmount > 0
    AND (:mineral_name IS NULL OR :mineral_name = '' OR min.MineralName LIKE '%' || :mineral_name || '%')
  GROUP BY sb.SystemID, min.MineralName
) m ON m.SystemID = n.SystemID
LEFT JOIN FCT_RaceSysSurvey rss
  ON rss.SystemID = n.SystemID AND rss.GameID = :game_id AND rss.RaceID = :race_id
ORDER BY n.hops, "TotalAccessible" DESC
minerals_near_system.notes: Mineral amounts are raw survey values. TotalAccessible = TotalAmount * AvgAccessibility, a proxy for how much is economically recoverable. max_hops defaults to 8 for fast local queries — increase for wider searches but expect longer runtime beyond 15 hops.

system_distances.description: Returns hop-by-hop distance data for the shortest route between two systems. Reports intra-system km per hop (entry JP distance + exit JP distance in AU, converted to km), cumulative km, and per-ship-class fuel cost at max speed for any fleet you name. Useful for fuel planning, logistics estimates, transit time calculations, or any other distance-dependent analysis.
system_distances.sql:
WITH RECURSIVE jump_chain AS (
  SELECT
    jp.SystemID,
    0 AS hops,
    0.0 AS total_km,
    '|' || CAST(jp.SystemID AS TEXT) || '|' AS path
  FROM FCT_JumpPoint jp
  WHERE jp.GameID = :game_id AND jp.SystemID = :source_system_id
  GROUP BY jp.SystemID

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    jp_dest.SystemID,
    jc.hops + 1,
    jc.total_km + (jp_src.Distance + jp_dest.Distance) * 149597870.7,
    jc.path || CAST(jp_dest.SystemID AS TEXT) || '|'
  FROM jump_chain jc
  INNER JOIN FCT_JumpPoint jp_src
    ON jc.SystemID = jp_src.SystemID
    AND jp_src.GameID = :game_id
    AND jp_src.WPLink > 0
  INNER JOIN FCT_JumpPoint jp_dest
    ON jp_src.WPLink = jp_dest.WarpPointID
    AND jp_dest.GameID = :game_id
  WHERE jc.path NOT LIKE '%|' || CAST(jp_dest.SystemID AS TEXT) || '|%'
),
route AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM jump_chain
  WHERE SystemID = :destination_system_id
  ORDER BY hops ASC, total_km ASC
  LIMIT 1
),
fleet_ships AS (
  SELECT
    s.ShipID,
    s.ShipName,
    s.Fuel AS CurrentFuel,
    sc.ClassName,
    sc.FuelCapacity,
    sc.FuelEfficiency
  FROM FCT_Fleet f
  INNER JOIN FCT_Ship s ON s.FleetID = f.FleetID AND s.GameID = :game_id AND s.Destroyed = 0
  INNER JOIN FCT_ShipClass sc ON s.ShipClassID = sc.ShipClassID
  WHERE f.GameID = :game_id
    AND (:fleet_name IS NULL OR :fleet_name = '' OR f.Name LIKE '%' || :fleet_name || '%')
)
SELECT
  r.hops AS "Hops",
  ROUND(r.total_km / 1e9, 4) AS "TotalDistance_Bkm",
  REPLACE(TRIM(r.path, '|'), '|', ' -> ') AS "Route",
  fs.ClassName AS "ShipClass",
  COUNT(fs.ShipID) AS "ShipCount",
  ROUND(r.total_km * fs.FuelEfficiency, 0) AS "FuelCost_Litres",
  ROUND(AVG(fs.CurrentFuel), 0) AS "AvgCurrentFuel",
  ROUND(fs.FuelCapacity, 0) AS "FuelCapacity",
  CASE
    WHEN r.total_km * fs.FuelEfficiency <= MIN(fs.CurrentFuel) THEN 'OK'
    WHEN r.total_km * fs.FuelEfficiency <= fs.FuelCapacity THEN 'REFUEL BEFORE DEPARTURE'
    ELSE 'INSUFFICIENT RANGE — NEEDS WAYPOINT REFUEL'
  END AS "FuelStatus"
FROM route r
LEFT JOIN fleet_ships fs ON 1=1
GROUP BY r.hops, r.total_km, r.path, fs.ClassName, fs.FuelCapacity, fs.FuelEfficiency
ORDER BY fs.ClassName
system_distances.notes: Intra-system distance per hop = (entry_jp_AU + exit_jp_AU) * 149,597,870.7 km. This is the actual km traveled within each system transiting between jump points (or JP to/from star for first/last leg). FuelEfficiency on FCT_ShipClass is in litres/km. Fuel cost = sum of (hop_km * FuelEfficiency) across all hops, per class. Does not account for speed throttling — assumes max speed. Fleet fuel data shows current fuel held vs estimated cost so callers can judge refuel needs themselves.

ship_ordnance_status.description: Per-ship ordnance status — loaded vs template vs deficit, with ship location (system, orbit body, fleet) and collier flag. Colliers carry ordnance as cargo for transfer; their deficits should not be counted against combat readiness.
ship_ordnance_status.sql:
SELECT
  s.ShipID,
  s.ShipName,
  sc.ClassName,
  sc.Collier,
  f.FleetName,
  star.Name AS SystemName,
  sbn.Name AS OrbitBody,
  mt.Name AS MissileName,
  COALESCE(sw.Amount, 0) AS Loaded,
  sot.Amount AS Template,
  (sot.Amount - COALESCE(sw.Amount, 0)) AS Deficit
FROM FCT_Ship s
JOIN FCT_ShipClass sc ON s.ShipClassID = sc.ShipClassID AND sc.GameID = :game_id
JOIN FCT_Fleet f ON s.FleetID = f.FleetID AND f.GameID = :game_id
JOIN FCT_Star star ON star.SystemID = f.SystemID AND star.Component = 1 AND star.GameID = :game_id
LEFT JOIN FCT_SystemBodyName sbn ON sbn.SystemBodyID = f.OrbitBodyID AND sbn.RaceID = :race_id AND sbn.GameID = :game_id
JOIN FCT_ShipOrdnanceTemplate sot ON sot.ShipID = s.ShipID AND sot.GameID = :game_id
JOIN FCT_MissileType mt ON mt.MissileID = sot.MissileID AND mt.GameID = :game_id
LEFT JOIN FCT_ShipWeapon sw ON sw.ShipID = s.ShipID AND sw.MissileID = sot.MissileID AND sw.GameID = :game_id
WHERE s.RaceID = :race_id
  AND s.Destroyed = 0
  AND s.ScrapFlag = 0
  AND s.GameID = :game_id
ORDER BY sc.Collier ASC, star.Name, f.FleetName, s.ShipName, mt.Name
ship_ordnance_status.notes: Collier=1 means the ship is an ordnance transport — its template is the cargo load it carries for delivery, not a combat magazine. Exclude colliers from combat readiness metrics. OrdnanceTransferRate on FCT_ShipClass gives transfer speed in MSP/increment. Loaded = rounds physically in magazines. Template = desired load per FCT_ShipOrdnanceTemplate.

ship_class_classifications.description: Returns ClassName, Classification (e.g. Battleship, Heavy Cruiser, Destroyer), and HullAbbr (e.g. BB, CA, DD) for all Court ship classes. Use as a quick lookup when you need hull type context alongside ship_design_report, or to filter/group classes by classification. Joins FCT_ShipClass to FCT_HullDescription on HullDescriptionID.
ship_class_classifications.sql:
SELECT
  sc.ShipClassID,
  sc.ClassName,
  hd.Description AS Classification,
  hd.HullAbbr,
  CASE WHEN sc.Commercial = 1 THEN 'Commercial' ELSE 'Military' END AS Type,
  CASE WHEN sc.Obsolete = 1 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS Obsolete,
  sc.Size AS Tonnage
FROM FCT_ShipClass sc
JOIN FCT_HullDescription hd ON sc.HullDescriptionID = hd.HullDescriptionID
WHERE sc.GameID = :game_id
  AND sc.RaceID = :race_id
  AND sc.ClassShippingLineID = 0
ORDER BY sc.Commercial, sc.Obsolete, sc.Size DESC, sc.ClassName
ship_class_classifications.notes: FCT_HullDescription is a static lookup table with ~220 entries covering all Aurora hull types. HullDescriptionID 25 is the default ('Cruiser') when no classification is explicitly set. This query is intentionally lightweight — it is designed to complement ship_design_report, not replace it.

commander_profile.description: Full commander profile for RP/lore writing — returns all data visible in the Aurora commander window plus career history. Includes: core identity (name, rank, homeworld, gender, story character flag, notes), stats (promotion score, loyalty, health risk), skills/bonuses (crew training, tactical, diplomacy etc as percentages), traits (Born Leader, Analytical etc), medals with award reasons, hostile missiles destroyed, and full chronological career history with dates. Pass commander name fragment to filter; leave empty for all commanders.
commander_profile.sql:
SELECT
  -- Identity
  c.CommanderID,
  c.Name,
  r.RankName,
  r.RankAbbrev,
  CASE c.CommanderType WHEN 0 THEN 'Naval' WHEN 1 THEN 'Ground' WHEN 2 THEN 'Civilian' WHEN 3 THEN 'Scientist' ELSE 'Unknown' END AS CommanderType,
  sb.Name AS Homeworld,
  CASE c.Female WHEN 1 THEN 'Female' ELSE 'Male' END AS Gender,
  CASE c.StoryCharacter WHEN 1 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS StoryCharacter,
  CASE c.Deceased WHEN 1 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS Deceased,
  CASE c.RetireStatus WHEN 0 THEN 'Active' WHEN 1 THEN 'Retired' ELSE 'Unknown' END AS Status,

  -- Stats
  c.PromotionScore,
  c.Loyalty,
  CASE c.HealthRisk WHEN 1 THEN 'Good' WHEN 2 THEN 'Fair' WHEN 3 THEN 'Poor' WHEN 4 THEN 'Critical' ELSE 'Unknown' END AS Health,
  c.CareerStart,
  COALESCE(cm_msls.Amount, 0) AS HostileMissilesDestroyed,
  c.Notes,

  -- Skills (all bonuses as display-friendly percentage strings)
  (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(dbt.Description || ': ' || ROUND((cb.BonusValue - 1.0) * 100) || '%', ' | ')
   FROM FCT_CommanderBonuses cb
   JOIN DIM_CommanderBonusType dbt ON cb.BonusID = dbt.BonusID
   WHERE cb.CommanderID = c.CommanderID AND cb.GameID = c.GameID
   ORDER BY dbt.DisplayOrder) AS Skills,

  -- Traits
  (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(t.Name, ', ')
   FROM FCT_CommanderTraits ct
   JOIN DIM_TraitsList t ON ct.TraitID = t.TraitID
   WHERE ct.CmdrID = c.CommanderID AND ct.GameID = c.GameID) AS Traits,

  -- Medals
  (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(rm.MedalName || ' (' || rm.Abbreviation || ')' || CASE WHEN cm.AwardReason != '' THEN ': ' || cm.AwardReason ELSE '' END, ' | ')
   FROM FCT_CommanderMedal cm
   JOIN FCT_RaceMedals rm ON cm.MedalID = rm.MedalID AND cm.GameID = rm.GameID
   WHERE cm.CommanderID = c.CommanderID AND cm.GameID = c.GameID) AS Medals,

  -- Career history as ordered list
  (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(ch.HistoryText, ' || ')
   FROM FCT_CommanderHistory ch
   WHERE ch.CommanderID = c.CommanderID AND ch.GameID = c.GameID
   ORDER BY ch.GameTime ASC) AS CareerHistory

FROM FCT_Commander c
LEFT JOIN FCT_Ranks r ON c.RankID = r.RankID AND c.GameID = r.GameID
LEFT JOIN FCT_SystemBody sb ON c.HomeworldID = sb.SystemBodyID AND c.GameID = sb.GameID
LEFT JOIN FCT_CommanderMeasurement cm_msls ON c.CommanderID = cm_msls.CommanderID AND c.GameID = cm_msls.GameID AND cm_msls.MeasurementType = 6
WHERE c.GameID = :game_id
  AND c.RaceID = :race_id
  AND (:name_fragment = '' OR c.Name LIKE '%' || :name_fragment || '%')
ORDER BY r.Priority DESC, c.PromotionScore DESC
commander_profile.notes: Age is derived: (CareerStart - species GraduationAge * 31557600) gives approximate birth time; age = (current_game_time - birth_time) / 31557600. HealthRisk maps as: 1=Good, 2=Fair, 3=Poor, 4=Critical. BonusValue is a multiplier (1.35 = 35% bonus). GameTime in history is seconds since game epoch — convert to in-game date via the same 31557600 seconds/year formula from game start (Jan 1 2050 = epoch 0 for most campaigns, but verify via FCT_Game). Career history HistoryText contains both promotions and ship assignments verbatim as Aurora records them.
